name: Detail Header
description: Page header with breadcrumb, title, status badge, and action buttons. Supports standard page headers and user profile headers via presets.

standard.description: Page header with breadcrumb, title, status badge, and action buttons.

slots.breadcrumb: Breadcrumb navigation trail for page hierarchy
slots.actions: Action Buttons for edit, delete, or export

profile.description: User profile header with banner image, avatar, display name, bio, and edit button.

slots.banner: Full-width banner image (200px height) with gradient overlay
slots.avatar-row: Overlapping Avatar (offset -40px) with upload overlay on hover, plus edit Button
slots.info: Display name (_heading3), bio paragraph, location + website row with icons

slots.breadcrumb: Breadcrumb navigation trail for page hierarchy
slots.actions: Action Buttons for edit, delete, or export
